name: Offset Marketplace
description: Carbon offset marketplace for browsing verified projects, reviewing details, and completing offset purchases with cart-based checkout.

page_briefs.marketplace: Browse surface for verified carbon offset projects. A search and filter bar lets buyers narrow by project type, geography, registry, price, and vintage. Below, a product card grid renders each project with cover image, tCO2e price, registry badge, and an add-to-cart action. Persistent offset cart sits on the right with running totals and retirement summary.
page_briefs.project-detail: Single offset project profile. Detail header shows project name, type, location, registry, vintage, and price with a prominent add-to-cart action. Below, a content card grid surfaces methodology, co-benefits, verification docs, photos, and monitoring reports.
page_briefs.checkout: Purchase flow for retiring carbon offsets. Multi-step checkout flow walks through review, beneficiary, payment, and confirmation. A minimal cart summary pins the line items, total tCO2e, total cost, and retirement serial numbers throughout the flow.

shells.sidebar-main: Left navigation sidebar with primary content column
